label: The Refractor's Loft
description: The Refractor's Loft occupies a narrow upper bay above The Prismwright Arcade, enclosed by faceted vitrified panels ribbed to scatter Lacrymara’s copper-white twilight into measured bands. A built-in sleeping alcove is set behind a slatted mirror screen, while grounded gutters run along the floorline to bleed off charge from glass-dust fallouts carried up from the shop. One wall is given to a fixed calibration shelf and lens-cradle recesses, arranged with the same metrological discipline as the sales plinths below. The air holds a persistent mineral brightness from dust-slick surfaces, and every plane is cut to preserve the city’s seam-line geometry in miniature.
